name: Dinner Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Butter, margarine or shortening, softened
3/4 cup Egg yolk plus water to measure
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except the beaten egg yolk, into the inner pot in the order listed.
2. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Use DOUGH setting and press START.
4. The dough will be completed in 1 hour and 15 minutes.
5. Remove the dough from the inner pot and place it in a greased bowl, turning to coat evenly.
6. Cover and let rest in a warm, draft-free place for 20-30 minutes.
7. Punch down the dough and divide into 12 equal pieces.
8. On a floured surface, shape the dough into 12 balls.
9. Place the shaped balls on a greased baking sheet.
10. Cover and let rise in a warm, draft-free place for 20-30 minutes.
11. Bake in a 375-degree oven for 8-10 minutes.
